decisions.briefing: Market posted mild gains today (NASDAQ +0.7%, S&P 500 +0.4%) — a neutral session, not a risk-on signal. Strategy memory is clear: the right cadence is to hold cash through neutral days and wait for NASDAQ +2%+ before deploying. Despite having 4 open slots and $677 in cash, forcing entries on a low-conviction day risks poor fills. All six positions remain held with stop-losses and profit targets active.

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equities drifted modestly higher on July 9, with the NASDAQ up 0.7% and the S&P 500 gaining 0.4%, supported by continued strength in semiconductor and AI-related names as investors maintained a cautiously constructive tone heading into mid-year earnings season. Broad sector rotation within technology kept indices in positive territory, though the absence of a major catalyst limited upside conviction. Trading volumes were moderate, suggesting institutions were not aggressively adding risk on either side.
market_education.summary_zh: 美國股市7月9日溫和收漲，那斯達克指數上漲0.7%，標普500指數升0.4%，半導體及人工智能相關個股繼續提振大市，投資者在進入年中財報季前維持審慎樂觀的態度。科技板塊內部資金輪動令指數保持正面，惟缺乏重大催化劑限制了升幅。成交量處於溫和水準，顯示機構投資者並未積極加倉。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Dry powder refers to cash reserves held back specifically to deploy when a high-quality opportunity arises. Keeping dry powder on neutral or low-conviction days — rather than chasing marginal setups — lets you enter with full size and confidence when a genuine risk-on signal appears, improving your average entry quality and overall return.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 「乾火藥」指刻意保留的現金儲備，專用於把握高確信度的進場機會。在市況中性或訊號不明朗時保留現金，而非勉強追入邊緣機會，可讓投資者在真正的風險偏好訊號出現時以充足資金果斷入市，從而提升平均進場質素及整體回報。
